_notes.react19: Upgraded from React 18 to 19 -- all dapp-kit versions require react ^19.
_notes.mysten-sui: Frontend transaction builders import @mysten/sui modules directly, so the package is declared explicitly instead of relying on dapp-kit transitive resolution.
_notes.dapp-kit-version: 0.1.9 is current. No React 18 compatible version exists.
